arts.ttl: “We will confirm a few things”: Oliver Glasner drops hint regarding key star’s future
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner suggests Crystal Palace are closing in on a new deal with full-back Daniel Munoz. Oliver Glasner has done a decent job at Selhurst Park this time around. He will look to build on it next season but needs to ensure that Crystal Palace hold onto some of their best players. arts.ttl: Bournemouth send officials for key clash – Manchester United’s presence not new at club
arts.sum: Midtjylland picked up a 4-2 win over Copenhagen in the Danish Superliga yesterday. It has now emerged that officials from Bournemouth and Manchester United were keeping a close eye on the tie. arts.sum: Crystal Palace host Bournemouth in the Premier League on Saturday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV and live stream, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: 'What we demand from each other': Glasner’s pre-Bournemouth press conference
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says Crystal Palace are targeting a return to the principles which have made them such a challenging opponent to face in recent months, as the Eagles prepare to host Bournemouth at Selhurst Park on Saturday (19th April, 15:00 BST).
The Premier League have confirmed that Crystal Palace’s match away at Tottenham Hotspur will now take place on Sunday, 11th May, kicking off at 14:15 BST.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace confirm length of Daniel Munoz contract extension as Man City, Chelsea suffer transfer blow
arts.sum: Crystal Palace announce that right wing-back Daniel Munoz, who has previously been linked with Man City, Chelsea and Barcelona, has extended his contract at the club.
